ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "bid_number" TEXT /* Bid number associated with the contract */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contract */,
  "company_awarded" TEXT /* Company awarded the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  "executive_summary" TEXT /* File path to the executive summary */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "procurement_method" TEXT /* Method of procurement (e.g., open tender, restricted tender) */,
  "tender_status" TEXT /* Status of the tender (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_company_awarded FOREIGN KEY ("company_awarded") REFERENCES companies ("company_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "company_reg_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract document */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., award letter, agreement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_documents_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the amendment belongs to */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment */,
  "amendment_type" TEXT /* Type of amendment (e.g., scope, value, timeline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_amendments_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, cheque) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_payments_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contract manager, procurement officer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contract */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_access_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_contract" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the department in the contract (e.g., lead, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id", "contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies_contract" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the company in the contract (e.g., contractor, supplier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the variation belongs to */,
  "variation_date" TEXT /* Date the variation was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variation */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of variation (e.g., scope, value, timeline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_variations_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being audited */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being tracked */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was recorded */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the contract performance (e.g., satisfactory, unsatisfactory) */,
  "performance_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the contract performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_performance_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_expenditure" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being tracked */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure was made */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_type" TEXT /* Type of expenditure (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_expenditure_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)
